author: seanb4t
text: Closed: extracting a shared partial-update helper would be premature abstraction. The pattern is identical but the field sets differ, making a generic helper more complex than the duplication it removes.

author: seanb4t
text: Review gate FAIL: runConstitutionScan behavior was fixed (nil guard, empty language warning, --yes no longer triggers scan) but function remains untested. It lives in cmd/specgraph main package — testing requires either extracting to a testable package or integration/e2e tests. Escalating to user.

author: seanb4t
text: Review gate FAIL: bootstrapConstitution was rewritten with proper error handling, config path usage, size cap, and structured mapping, but function remains untested. It lives in cmd/specgraph main package — testing requires extraction or integration tests. Escalating to user.
